line_items.description: Upholstery Project — Roll-Arm Sofa — Full Reupholstery (sofa, standard)

terms: 50% deposit required. Balance due upon completion.

windows.name: Elegant Essential
windows.notes: single-layer panels — cotton-polyester blend in solid beige, clean and simple.

recommendations: The window features two single-layer panels in a soft, solid beige cotton-polyester blend, providing a clean and understated look. The fabric drapes smoothly with a subtle sheen, allowing natural light to filter through gently. The panels are mounted on a basic brushed nickel rod with simple spherical finials, complementing the room's neutral palette. The overall effect is serene and functional, enhancing the room's transitional style without overwhelming it.

This simple approach works well for the space as it maintains the room's transitional aesthetic while providing necessary privacy and light control. The neutral fabric blends seamlessly with the existing decor, ensuring a cohesive look without additional complexity or cost.

windows.name: Designer's Choice
windows.notes: Roman shade with sheers — textured linen with a subtle herringbone pattern, layered and textured. sheers behind Roman shade

recommendations: A Roman shade in a textured linen with a subtle herringbone pattern in light beige provides a sophisticated texture. Behind the shade, sheer white panels add a layer of softness, allowing light to diffuse beautifully into the room. The shade is mounted on an ornamental bronze rod with intricate leaf-shaped finials, adding a touch of elegance. The blackout lining with interlining gives the shade a plush, full appearance, creating a cozy and inviting atmosphere. The combination of textures and layers adds depth and warmth to the room.

The layered approach with a Roman shade and sheers introduces texture and depth, enhancing the room's visual interest while providing excellent light control and privacy. The decorative hardware adds a touch of luxury, making the window a focal point without overpowering the room's existing elements.

windows.name: Ultimate Luxury
windows.notes: sheers + drapery panels + cornice — crushed silk velvet with a deep luster in ivory, statement and multi-layered. decorative trim, tassel tiebacks, beaded fringe

recommendations: This treatment features luxurious crushed silk velvet drapery panels in a rich ivory with a deep, lustrous sheen, creating a dramatic and opulent look. The panels are paired with delicate, flowing sheers in a soft white, allowing light to glow through with a gentle, ethereal quality. Above, a custom cornice in a complementary fabric adds a statement top treatment. The drapery is mounted on a hand-forged iron rod with sparkling crystal finials, and the entire setup is motorized for ease of use. Decorative trims, tassel tiebacks, and beaded fringe add intricate details, making the window a showpiece. The contrast lining in champagne peeks out subtly, enhancing the luxurious feel. The overall impact is grand and breathtaking, transforming the room into a luxurious retreat.

The 'wow factor' here comes from the combination of premium materials, intricate detailing, and the multi-layered approach, which together create a statement piece that commands attention. The motorization adds modern convenience, while the custom hardware and extras elevate the design to a level of opulence that makes the room feel like a high-end sanctuary.

upholstery.name: Roll-Arm Sofa — Full Reupholstery
upholstery.notes: Full reupholstery in blue denim. Classic roll-arm silhouette with tight back and loose seat cushions.

upholstery.name: Throw Pillow 20x20" (x2)
upholstery.notes: Two 20x20 inch accent pillows in matching blue denim. Knife edge or self-welt finish.

upholstery.name: Bolster Pillow 36"
upholstery.notes: One 36-inch bolster pillow in blue denim. Coordinating end caps.
